commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed with canonical REDACTION_PROFILES, redactEvidencePack/redactNotification, and the approval replay refactored to render through the profile spec.

commands.command: node --test backend-dist/channels.test.js backend-dist/telnyx.test.js backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/migration.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js backend-dist/signals.test.js backend-dist/twilio.test.js
commands.summary: 97 backend tests passed, including per-profile evidence/notification redaction, the fail-closed unknown-profile default, the replay integration (summary-only, status-only, unknown), and the list/preview endpoints.
Renderer TypeScript typecheck passed with the added RedactionProfileSpec type.
Local audit passed after AGH-022 implementation and ledger updates; Phase 6 (communication firewall and consent) complete.

environment.process_note: AGH-022: canonical per-surface redaction profiles applied to evidence packs and notifications; approval replay renders through the selected profile and an unknown profile fails closed to the most restrictive surface.
